description: A pen and ink drawing showing two men on horseback riding briskly along a country road. One rides a brown horse and wears a tricorn hat, the other rides a lighter horse and wears a top hat. A small dog runs alongside them. In the background, a simple building and a bare pole are visible. The caption at the bottom reads 'ROUTE DE POISSY'. The drawing style is lively and animated with quick, expressive linework.
